Whether you live near the Aqueduct Racetrack area or in the neighborhoods surrounding Cross Bay Boulevard, we're familiar with the housing stock and respond quickly throughout 11420 and surrounding zip codes.

faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in South Ozone Park?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in South Ozone Park typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500 depending on the size of your home, severity of infestation, and treatment method required. We offer free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in South Ozone Park homes?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments take 4-6 hours for an average-sized home. Heat treatments can often eliminate bed bugs in a single day, while chemical treatments may require a follow-up visit 10-14 days later to ensure complete eradication of all life stages.

faqs.question: Do I need to leave my South Ozone Park home during bed bug treatment?
faqs.answer: For heat treatments, you'll need to vacate for 6-8 hours while we raise temperatures to lethal levels. For chemical treatments, we recommend staying away for 4-6 hours after application. We provide detailed preparation instructions and can work around your schedule.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for children and pets in South Ozone Park?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our bed bug treatments are EPA-approved and safe when applied by our licensed professionals. We use family-friendly and pet-safe products, and provide clear re-entry timeframes. Heat treatment is a completely chemical-free option ideal for families with young children or sensitive individuals.
